clinical_recommendation.action: CONTRAINDICATED - do not use or use alternative chemotherapy
clinical_recommendation.cpic_guideline: Do not use fluorouracil; select alternative chemotherapy
clinical_recommendation.monitoring: DPYD poor metabolizer phenotype requires avoidance of fluorouracil-based therapy

llm_generated_explanation.summary: Patient with DPYD poor metabolizer phenotype from *2A/*2A diplotype. Fluorouracil metabolism is severely impaired, creating life-threatening toxicity risk.
llm_generated_explanation.biological_mechanism: The DPYD *2A allele results in complete loss of dihydropyrimidine dehydrogenase enzyme function. This enzyme is critical for fluorouracil metabolism. Complete enzyme deficiency leads to severe, potentially fatal, drug accumulation and toxicity.

variant_effects.rs3918290: DPYD *2A allele - complete loss of enzyme function (poor metabolizer)
